hero.title: Realize Your {{highlight}} With Us
hero.subtitle: CV. New Rizquna Elfath is a professional publisher and printer in Purwokerto. We are ready to help you from manuscript to published book — official ISBN, guaranteed Intellectual Property Rights, national distribution.
hero.trusted_by: Trusted by hundreds of authors and academic institutions

features.label: OUR SERVICES
features.title: Complete Publishing Solution
features.subtitle: From raw manuscript to market-ready book, we handle it all
features.item1_desc: Professional publishing services with official ISBN from the National Library. Your manuscript will go through editing, layout, and cover design by our expert team.
features.item2_desc: Modern printing facilities for Print on Demand or mass printing (offset). Sharp print results with choice paper materials and sturdy binding.
features.item3_desc: Processing official ISBN from the National Library and registration of Intellectual Property Rights (IPR) to protect your intellectual work legally.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: Quality Book {{highlight}} Partner
about.subtitle: CV. New Rizquna Elfath is an official IKAPI member publisher located in Purwokerto, Central Java. Since 2020, we have helped hundreds of authors — lecturers, researchers, and practitioners — publish their best work.
about.check1: Official Member of IKAPI Central Java
